TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Pabuisan ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Sincima go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 140 buwan, 377 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 46% kyan ku 175 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 54% kyan ku 202 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 17%, Sakizaya 1%, Bunun2%, Tayan 1%, Truku 8%, Paywan 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Pabuisan hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Pabuisan hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Pabuisan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Pabuisan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Pabuisan hya' ga Paudadan. tay mkyahu' na Pabuisan hya' ga Kaliyawan. tay 'llaw na Pabuisan hya' ga Pacidal. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ paβuis~ɕan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu s~ɕinʦ~ʨima ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, s~ɕakizaja *%, βunun*%, tajan *%, truku *%, pajwan *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na paβuis~ɕan ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na paβuis~ɕan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na paβuis~ɕan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na paβuis~ɕan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na paβuis~ɕan ħjaʔ ɣa pau*a*an. taj mkjaħuʔ na paβuis~ɕan ħjaʔ ɣa kalijawan. taj ʔllaw na paβuis~ɕan ħjaʔ ɣa paʦ~ʨi*al. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Pabuisan ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Sincima go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 140 buwan, 377 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 46% kyan ku 175 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 54% kyan ku 202 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 17%, Sakizaya 1%, Bunun2%, Tayan 1%, Truku 8%, Paywan 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Pabuisan hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Pabuisan hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Pabuisan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Pabuisan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Pabuisan hya' ga Paudadan. tay mkyahu' na Pabuisan hya' ga Kaliyawan. tay 'llaw na Pabuisan hya' ga Pacidal. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ paβuis~ɕan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu s~ɕinʦ~ʨima ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, s~ɕakizaja *%, βunun*%, tajan *%, truku *%, pajwan *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na paβuis~ɕan ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na paβuis~ɕan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na paβuis~ɕan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na paβuis~ɕan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na paβuis~ɕan ħjaʔ ɣa pau*a*an. taj mkjaħuʔ na paβuis~ɕan ħjaʔ ɣa kalijawan. taj ʔllaw na paβuis~ɕan ħjaʔ ɣa paʦ~ʨi*al. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
